ddls:
CREATE TABLE "maintenance_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drainage asset */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User or contractor who performed the activity */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was completed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drainage asset */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection */,
  "inspector" TEXT /* User who performed the inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the inspection */,
  "defects" TEXT /* List of defects or issues found during the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drainage asset */,
  "photo_file" TEXT /* File path to the photo */,
  "photo_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was taken */,
  "photo_description" TEXT /* Description of the photo content */,
  "photo_size" REAL /* Size of the photo file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gis_data" (
  "gis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GIS data */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drainage asset */,
  "gis_data_file" TEXT /* File path to the GIS data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of GIS data (e.g., Shapefile, GeoJSON) */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the GIS data was created or updated */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the GIS data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "asset_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first drainage asset */,
  "asset_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second drainage asset */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "relationship_status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stormwater_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stormwater quality data */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drainage asset */,
  "quality_date" TEXT /* Date of the stormwater quality data */,
  "quality_result" TEXT /* Result of the stormwater quality data */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Specific parameter measured (e.g., pH, Turbidity) */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "standard" REAL /* Standard or threshold value for the parameter */,
  "deviation" REAL /* Deviation from the standard value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outfalls" (
  "outfall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outfall data */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drainage asset */,
  "outfall_date" TEXT /* Date of the outfall data */,
  "outfall_result" TEXT /* Result of the outfall data */,
  "discharge_rate" REAL /* Rate at which water is discharged */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Quality of water discharged (e.g., Good, Fair, Poor) */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Potential environmental impact of the outfall (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "mitigation_measures" TEXT /* Any measures taken to mitigate environmental impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outfall_id")
)
